{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/5268652?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/LucyEgan/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/LucyEgan/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/LucyEgan/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/LucyEgan/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/LucyEgan", "id": 5268652, "login": "LucyEgan", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjUyNjg2NTI=", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/LucyEgan/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/LucyEgan/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/LucyEgan/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/LucyEgan/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/LucyEgan/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/LucyEgan", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": null, "cvss": {"score": 6.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 6.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-754", "name": "Improper Check for Unusual or Exceptional Conditions"}], "description": "A `LIVE` query whose `WHERE` clause evaluates to an error caused the source data modifier (the user creating, updating, or deleting a record on the watched table) to fail instead. Calling any arbitrary SurrealQL function with a typed parameter and passing a value of the wrong type — for example `LIVE SELECT * FROM t WHERE string::trim(deny)` — triggered an evaluation error inside the LIVE notification path. That error then propagated through to the triggering write, rolling back the attempted change.

While such a `LIVE` query was registered, all `CREATE`, `UPDATE`, and `DELETE` operations on the watched table failed — including those issued by a root user — for as long as the registration remained active. Registering the `LIVE` required `select` permission on the table; no other permission on the table was needed.

### Impact

An authenticated user with `select` permission on a table can prevent all `CREATE`, `UPDATE`, and `DELETE` operations on that table — by any other user, up to and including root — for the lifetime of a single registered `LIVE` query. Service is restored when the `LIVE` query is killed or the session that registered it ends.

### Patches

A patch has been introduced that:

1. **Decouples LIVE query evaluation errors from the source transaction** — when `lq_check` returns an error during the LIVE notification path, the error is now reported to the LIVE subscriber as an `Action::Error` notification and the LIVE processing path returns `Ok(())`. The triggering write proceeds normally.
2. **Defers the error notification until after the permission check** — the `Action::Error` notification is only delivered after the LIVE subscription's `PERMISSIONS` clause has been evaluated, so unauthorised subscribers do not learn even that an error occurred (closing an information-disclosure side channel introduced by the first part of the fix).

- Versions 3.1.0 and later are not affected by this issue.

### Workarounds

Users unable to upgrade should restrict the ability of untrusted users to register `LIVE` queries by removing the `select` permission on tables they want to keep writeable, or by gating LIVE registration at the application layer.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-4v76-cw68-4vc9", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-01T20:13:37Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-4v76-cw68-4vc9", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-4v76-cw68-4vc9"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-07-01T20:13:37Z", "references": ["https://github.com/surrealdb/surrealdb/security/advisories/GHSA-4v76-cw68-4vc9", "https://github.com/surrealdb/surrealdb/commit/af835eb199ad2327a04c42101d11aff21fce7e47", "https://github.com/surrealdb/surrealdb/commit/b29e03f0714d1c4ec091fc6f27f1edbe243b8aec", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-4v76-cw68-4vc9"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/surrealdb/surrealdb/security-advisories/GHSA-4v76-cw68-4vc9", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/surrealdb/surrealdb", "summary": "SurrealDB: Crafting malicious LIVE queries writes to the database, resulting in DoS, without permission to the table required", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-01T20:13:39Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-4v76-cw68-4vc9", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "3.1.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "rust", "name": "surrealdb"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 3.1.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: SurrealDB: Crafting malicious LIVE queries writes to the database, resulting in DoS, without permission to the table required
